text_block_list.name: School Store Employee
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure about this?! You're really willing to
try... the cursed ice cream?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, so this notorious new flavor is... grilled
mutton, eh?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
They say the moment you taste it, the stench and
saltiness spread throughout your whole mouth!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: But it's not the taste you wanna watch out for.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Everyone who gives in to their curiosity and tries
this stuff ends up—for whatever reason—suffering
some sort of mysterious misfortune that very
same day!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Making basic mistakes on quizzes, forgetting
their shoes...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Didn't one person even get her tail burnt in a
hairdryer accident?

text_block_list.name: School Store Employee
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, she did. Which is why the ice cream's
rumored to be cursed. I haven't been able to sell
a single cone since then.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Please lay your worries to rest. I'll be the one to
break the curse!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Once people know this ice cream is safe, I'm sure
they'll be jumping at the chance to buy it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hmm? Whaddya think you're looking at?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I've got it. After hearing our plight, your
daring heart is beating for a challenge, is it?!

text_block_list.name: School Store Employee
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're going to try it too?! Thank you so
much!

Before I even have a chance to process what's
happening, the employee brings each of us an ice
cream.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now that's an... interesting color. What wouldja
call it? Mulberry?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: This feels... deeply unnerving.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You sure about this, Satono? My gut's telling me
we're teetering on a knife's edge here.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You can always take a step back to where it's
safe.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: No! I can't back down now!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You can never truly know the outcome of an
action until you take it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Action is what guides us to outcomes! And intent
determines our actions!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Hahaha! That's what I'm talkin' about! I like
your pluck!

Realizing that I've missed my chance to jump off
this sinking ship, I steel myself and join Satono
Diamond and the others in eating the ice cream.

Just as the rumors said, the truly indescribable
flavor spreads throughout my mouth...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Th-there! All finished! Now I suppose we must
wait and see if anything bad happens...
choice_data_list: Maybe we ought to stay put...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Waiting for the curse to come to us, huh? Heh...
That sounds pretty fun, actually.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well then, everyone! Let's hold on tight and wait
it out!

text_block_list.name: Sketchy Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, finally made it in! Now, which student
should I interview first? Gonna hit 'em with all my
super hard-hitting questions!

text_block_list.name: Sketchy Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Looks like I've found the perfect targets.
Excuse meee...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Ha ha ha! So you've shown yourself!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Y'know, I was gettin' real tired of waiting around!

text_block_list.name: Sketchy Reporter
text_block_list.text: Gyah! S-somebody help me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hm? Who was that just now?

And so, we successfully break the curse without
encountering any disasters.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Egads! You mean we should go on the offensive?
Sounds splendid! Onward, comrades!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So we're all going to march around until
something happens, then? Challenge accepted!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, let's march like we mean it! Last one to
France is a rotten egg!
choice_data_list: Uh, let's stay on academy grounds!

text_block_list.text:
And so I set off strutting around the school with
Satono Diamond and the others...

As we march on fearlessly, no misfortune befalls
us!
Word of our bravery spreads, and...

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Can I get that cursed flavor?
Ah! Me too!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Looks like things are really picking up
now! ♪

With the stigma gone, the ice cream's distinct and
somewhat addictive taste helps it to sell quickly.
However...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: What?! It still hasn't sold out?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
How could this be? We dispelled the curse rumors
and everything!
choice_data_list: I mean... it's still grilled mutton flavor.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Ahhh.
